message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Team should update .team/ profiles with retro learnings">
Observation from the project owner: The team is doing mini-retros but not capturing the learnings in persistent files. The Step 8 retro items were documented in TEAM_AGREEMENTS.md (good), but individual team members aren't updating their own profiles in .team/ with lessons learned. For example, Carson's profile has a "Lessons Learned" section, Luca's has "Lessons From Previous Sessions", etc. Each team member should update their own profile's lessons learned section after retros so the knowledge persists. Please raise this with the team — each person should update their .team/ profile with relevant learnings from recent retros. Since you're the Driver, you'll need to make the edits, but each reviewer should tell you what to add to their profile.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Good point from the project owner. Let me raise this with the team. But first, let me check CI status, and then we can do the mini-retro where this topic fits naturally.

content.text: CI is in progress (run 21970802541). While we wait, let me broadcast the profile update request to the team -- this fits well as part of the mini-retro.

input.content:
Feedback from the project owner: We're doing mini-retros but not capturing learnings in our individual `.team/` profiles. Each of us has a "Lessons Learned" or similar section in our profile (e.g., `.team/carson-gross.md`, `.team/luca-palmieri.md`, etc.). 

The project owner asks that each team member identify relevant learnings from recent retros (Steps 8 and 9) and tell me what to add to their profile's lessons learned section. Since I'm the Driver, I'll make the edits.

Please review your own `.team/` profile and send me the specific text you'd like added. Think about:
- Patterns that worked well during Steps 8-9
- Mistakes to avoid next time
- Process improvements that affected your area of expertise

We'll do this as part of our mini-retro after CI goes green. CI is currently running (run 21970802541).
